sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.7.0: GET/POST /robots-txt endpoint; robots_txt filter override at priority 99; physical-file detection with warning.
v2.6.0: Styled XML sitemaps (XSL) + per-type sub-sitemaps.
v2.5.0: WordPress admin panel + Edit Post/Page meta box.
